category_sources: source_facts.description says command-line toolbox for fancy output in the terminal; official Textualize/rich-cli README says Rich-CLI renders/highlights files and formats terminal output.
display_name_sources: Official Textualize/rich-cli README title is Rich-CLI.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README documents installation, Markdown, JSON, CSV, pager, network, export, and general options; no separate rich-cli docs site was identified.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.homepage is the official Textualize/rich-cli GitHub repository and the repository README identifies the project.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README describe terminal output formatting, syntax highlighting, Markdown, JSON, CSV, and Python implementation.
